name: com.aethernexus.uiwidgets
description:
General-purpose Unity UGUI widget library: modal dialogs, virtualized scroll lists, enhanced buttons (ButtonX), context menus, tabs, sliders, card UI, tooltips, toasts, procedural graphic primitives, UI effects, and an in-house layout engine (LayoutX). Built on Foundation Platform (com.aethernexus.foundationplatform).

Requires Foundation Platform (which embeds Cysharp UniTask). Asset uses UniTask under the MIT license; see Foundation Platform Third-Party Notices.txt for details.

Requires Unity Input System and uGUI.

samples.description: Manual demo scene component exercising InputDialog (basic, validated, keyboard shortcuts).
